options.name: <capacitance_limit>
options.description: Value for the maximum capacitance limit

options.name: <object_list>
options.description: List of objects: ports, instance pins, library cell pins, clocks or current_design

options.name: -clock_path
options.description: Apply the capacitance limit constraint to pins in the clock network of the clocks defined in object_list

options.name: -data_path
options.description: Apply the capacitance limit constraint to data path pins, where the path is launched by the clocks defined in object_list

options.name: -fall
options.description: Apply the capacitance limit constraint to falling capacitances

options.name: -override
options.description: Overrides capacitance limit from other sources namely library/constraints

options.name: -rise
options.description: Apply the capacitance limit constraint to rising capacitances
